name: Blizzards
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Chocolate Alba according to package directions.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl with the Chocolate Alba.
3. Blend all ingredients together until smooth and well combined.
Serving: 2 servings, 2 glasses of milk, 1 serving of fat, 1 serving of protein, 1 serving of bread, 10 optional calories.
